---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.panel .panel-dark .contact-panel}
## Contact

For research collaboration or academic inquiries, please contact me by email.

**Email**
[wangran940@163.com](mailto:wangran940@163.com)

**GitHub**
[https://github.com/Olivia-wr-research](https://github.com/Olivia-wr-research)
:::
